pricing.reason: The active custom provider exposed tokens and latency but no dollar or ChatGPT-credit rates.

routes.boundary: Use Terra as the default coordinator; escalate open-ended, high-value, or unusually ambiguous work to Sol.
Use only for bounded classification, normalization, read-only analysis, and requirement shaping with a deterministic oracle.
Only workflow routing was benchmarked. Use for confirmed, reversible, tightly scoped work; escalate on cross-module ambiguity, repeated failure, or risk.
Do not explore in the decision path. A challenger may run read-only in shadow mode but cannot decide acceptance, authority, merge, or release.
Use for open-ended, high-impact, adversarial, or unusually ambiguous work. Increase reasoning only after task framing and context reduction fail.

invalidationSignals: VibeRig routing or Skill prompt changes
Completion Oracle or scoring rubric changes
three comparable accepted observations contradict a route
one Critical safety, authority, or evidence-fidelity failure
